channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: DR Congo superfan denied US visa to support team at World Cup
item.description: Michel Kuka Mboladinga is iconic for his motionless tribute at DRC games, but a US World Cup repeat has been denied.

item.title: Why is Crimea critical to the Russia–Ukraine war?
item.description: Ukraine is intensifying attacks on Russian-controlled Crimea as Kyiv tries to pressure Moscow into ending the war.

item.title: Israel orders troops to prepare for ‘extended stay’ in Lebanon
item.description: Israeli Defence Minister Israel Katz says the military has been ordered to prepare for an ‘extended stay’ in Lebanon.

item.title: US Senate challenger, incumbent with same name to appear on Alaska ballot
item.description: Republican Senator Dan Sullivan has sought to have a namesake primary challenger removed, citing midterm confusion.

item.title: South Africa’s Broos smiles and snarls before Canada World Cup showdown
item.description: South Africa and Canada are both competing in the knockout stages of a World Cup for the first time.

item.title: Two killed, dozens injured in Israeli strike on displacement tents in Gaza
item.description: Two killed and dozens injured in Israeli strike on displacement tents in Gaza

item.title: Kenya rights groups say protesters found dumped, tortured after arrests
item.description: Six found and one missing, NGOs say, after arrests at memorial gatherings for protesters killed in 2024.

item.title: Iran urge FIFA to stand up to ‘really terrible’ World Cup treatment by US
item.description: Iran, who played their three group-stage matches at World Cup 2026, now face a wait to know if they will reach last 32.

item.title: Australia to double fines on Big Tech as children bypass social media ban
item.description: Canberra says tech platforms are still letting too many children bypass its under-16 social media ban.

item.title: How is framework agreement with Lebanon viewed in Israel?
item.description: Israel, Lebanon and US have signed deal aimed at ending hostilities between Israel and Hezbollah, but group rejects it.

item.title: Tropical Storm Mekkhala leaves Taiwan underwater
item.description: Tropical Storm Mekkhala has triggered severe flooding across parts of Taiwan.

item.title: Three security personnel killed in attack in Pakistan’s Karachi
item.description: Police say four attackers were also killed after gunmen stormed a Rangers facility in country's commercial capital.

item.title: Lebanon divided over framework agreement signed in Washington
item.description: Lebanon divided over framework agreement signed in Washington

item.title: Israeli drone attack kills young girl in Gaza ‘safe zone’
item.description: Israeli drones struck tents in al-Mawasi, Khan Younis, killing two Palestinians and wounding several others.

item.title: Bosnia: The lilies and dragons of the World Cup
item.description: Football is bringing out in our nation what the corrupt elite would not like to see.

item.title: Hezbollah rejects Israel-Lebanon agreement as Israeli attacks hit south
item.description: Israeli strike kills one in southern Lebanon as many view latest agreement with Israel as a 'surrender of sovereignty'.

item.title: With water cuts looming in Arizona in US, locals fight data centres
item.description: Arizona residents have campaigned against state’s data centres as they seek a share of the shrinking water supply.

item.title: Sabalenka defends Wimbledon prize protest, says it’s for struggling players
item.description: The world number one is in a group of players seeking a greater prize return at Grand Slams.

item.title: Bodycam shows driver offering armed police a lift mid-chase
item.description: Bodycam video showing a van driver offering an armed officer a lift to catch a fleeing suspect has gone viral in the UK.

item.title: Toxic Bielsa leaves ‘nothing good’ behind as Uruguay suffer World Cup shock
item.description: Uruguay's outgoing Argentinian coach Marcelo Bielsa has previously described himself as a 'toxic perfectionist'.

item.title: Cape Verde break record as smallest nation to reach World Cup knockouts
item.description: Cape Verde set sights on Lionel Messi's Argentina in last 32 as dream run continues at 2026 edition of FIFA's showpiece.

item.title: Israel-Lebanon deal ties ceasefire to Hezbollah disarmament: Will it work?
item.description: Hezbollah chief calls the deal 'null and void', raising questions if the latest agreement can lead to peace in Lebanon.

item.title: Venezuela leader jeered as rescue efforts hampered
item.description: Venezuela’s acting President Delcy Rodriguez has been jeered by residents devastated by the earthquakes.

item.title: ‘Pick up the phone’: IRGC appears to rebuff US Strait of Hormuz ‘hotline’
item.description: Iran's IRGC appears to have rejected US claims of a military hotline will operate between the two countries.

item.title: Three killed as Ukraine and Russia trade attacks overnight
item.description: Moscow's attacks are reported to have killed two, while Kyiv's attacks on Russia killed one.
